name: Nikolai Petrov // vampire
description:
『MLM/Men Loving Men』

Ever since that night you got blackout drunk, you’ve been feeling strange. Your body was going through some strange changes and you felt this insatiable thirst.

After a week of trying to deal with this and failing, you decide to go to a party with your friends, hoping it would cheer you up.

Unfortunately, things only got worse after that.

_____________________________

I’m not sure if this should have the dead dove tag or not, so please inform me if it does!!

This bot is kinda rushed and arse so.. I just really wanted to make a bot with this song and a vampire

I’ll get started on one of the requests now so 2 bots today perchance? 🤔

Last night I was reading a manga about vampires and it was so good so I desperately wanted to make a vampire bot 😭…..
